title: Black Ghast Harness
description: Replaces the brown happy ghast harness with sleek black leather for a bold, clean Nether look in the overworld.
body:
![A wide shot in the sky looking down at a bunch of floating happy ghasts from 1.21.6 wearing the Black Ghast Harness.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/791f993eb7fc15d0176f02325c70b3af259ac15f_0.webp)

🕶️ Black Ghast Harness – Dark, Clean Leather now ready for **1.21.7**

Upgrade the look of your happy ghast harness with a bold black leather texture. This minimalist resource pack swaps the default brown harness with deep, desaturated black, giving your ghasts a sleeker, edgier appearance — perfect for players who prefer darker aesthetics or a more neutral color palette.

 

**⚔️ Great for:**

1. Dark-themed or Nether builds
1. Contrast against white ghast textures (like the Happy Ghast)
1. Pairing with black armor, builds, or datapacks

 

**🧵 Features:**

- Fully replaces all brown harness parts with clean black leather
- No other colors changed – keeps Minecraft’s dye system intact
- Fully compatible with Minecraft **1.21.6 - 1.21.7**
- Works alone or alongside other ghast retextures (like Happy or Pastel Ghast)

 

**Ghast faces from:**
- '**Happy Ghast Redesign**' by Avrok

 

📦 Pack Version: 1.21.6 - 1.21.7
🎯 Resolution: 16x
